preview_text:
The model favours Uzbekistan to win, assigning the Central Asian side a 46% chance of victory. DR Congo's win probability stands at 24%, roughly half that of their opponent. A draw rates as the second-most-likely outcome at 30%, suggesting the match carries meaningful potential for a stalemate.

The forecast indicates a moderately competitive encounter, though with clear directional lean. Uzbekistan's advantage over DR Congo spans roughly 22 percentage points, but the substantial draw probability means the outcome remains genuinely uncertain. No single result dominates; the split across all three possibilities reflects a match without overwhelming favourite status.

The sportsbook and Polymarket consensus diverges sharply from the model. Books and crypto markets both favour DR Congo heavily—at 52% and 53% respectively—while assigning Uzbekistan only 24% and 23%. This 28-percentage-point gap between model and market on DR Congo's chances is substantial and material. The dashboard does not adjudicate which assessment is correct; users should note the disagreement and consider what information sources may underpin each view.
